title: author filter uses substring LIKE match rather than exact match
evidence: app.py:107 SELECT ... WHERE author LIKE '%'||?||'%' — GET /books?author=Orwell matches any author containing 'Orwell'
suggestion: Acceptable interpretation of ?author=; document that the filter is a substring match, or switch to exact match if exact semantics are intended

title: test_coverage=0.95 — a few error branches are unexercised
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.95; no tests POST/PUT with a non-JSON body (app.py:68,134), a non-integer year (app.py:85), or an empty-string title on PUT (app.py:140)
suggestion: Add tests for the 400 validation branches (missing JSON body, invalid year, blank title on update) to close the coverage gap

title: app runs with debug=True and binds 0.0.0.0
evidence: app.py:179 app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, debug=True) — Werkzeug debugger/reloader enabled and reachable on all interfaces
suggestion: Disable debug mode for anything beyond local development; gate via an env var
